Interface ChipListWidgetBuilder

    ChipListWidgetBuilder
    chipsEditable(boolean editable)
    Sets whether the chips of the chip list are editable.

    Methods inherited from interface WidgetBuilder

    build, displayName, tooltip, tooltip

  • Method Details

    • chipsEditable

      ChipListWidgetBuilder chipsEditable(boolean editable)
      Sets whether the chips of the chip list are editable. Each chip is its own text field and this allows toggling whether they can be edited or only added and removed. Defaults to true.
      Parameters:
      editable - Whether the chips are editable
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining
